item.title: 27 wholesome things for your weekend
item.description:
@StonesOnTheHill - I love this <3
This was towards the end of the pandemic, IIRC. Happily, the store is still around & they made "More love, less hate" their new logo - in rainbow colors, of course! https://confectionstx.com/
This was early in the pandemic when many people did the shopping (or cooking!) for their elderly friends and neighbors.
HE'S SO HAPPY OMG --- If you can spare a few bucks or even just an upvote, I'd be at LEAST as happy as that doggo if you could check out this post by a friend in a bad situation: https://imgur.com/gallery/trying-to-avoid-homelessness-again-ep67mty <3
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: A moment in History
item.dc:creator: floresFlyer

item.title: Update to ICE asshole throwing woman to ground from the reporter that filmed it.
item.description:
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement has taken one of its agents off the streets after he was caught on video throwing a distraught mother to the floor of a New York City courthouse in front of her two children on Thursday. It wasn’t the first time videos have captured scenes of immigration agents using violent force to carry out the Trump administration’s mass deportation campaign. But the videos of this incident — one of which I filmed for ProPublica — seemed to stir something different. In a rare move, the government publicly reprimanded an officer for such conduct. “The officer’s conduct in this video is unacceptable and beneath the men and women of ICE,” an assistant secretary at the Department of Homeland Security, Tricia McLaughlin, said. “Our ICE law enforcement are held to the highest professional standards and this officer is being relieved of current duties as we conduct a full investigation.”
I’ve only been in the U.S. as a reporter for eight weeks — so I just barely arrived. I come from Germany and am on the staff at Correctiv, a nonprofit investigative newsroom. I’d been alarmed by videos of masked ICE agents sweeping immigrants off the street, scenes I never thought I’d see in the United States, and I came with the goal of witnessing what was going on for myself. I wanted to report on how the administration’s immigration crackdown was playing out from the front lines. Since arriving, I’ve spent time reporting in immigrant neighborhoods, emergency rooms, churches, ICE field offices and, most recently, in the federal courthouse in lower Manhattan. I’ve gone there most every morning for the past two weeks. During that time, I’d seen ICE drag several immigrants away from their families, all of them sobbing and pleading with the officers not to separate them from their loved ones. But what happened Thursday was a shocking escalation. When I emerged from the elevator on the 14th floor, I heard a woman’s pleas. She sounded terrified. I walked around the corner to see what was happening. At the end of the hallway, I saw the woman, Monica Moreta-Galarza, standing in front of an agent. She was crying because her husband had been detained. She told the agent she was afraid her husband would be hurt. She wanted to go with him. I began recording and captured the agent barking back at the woman. “Adios,” he said, over and over, pressing toward her as if warning her to back away. When she didn’t, he grabbed her. The rest — including her children’s screams — has been memorialized online.
I followed Moreta-Galarza to the hospital. She is an immigrant from Ecuador and has been living in Coney Island since last year. Speaking in Spanish, she said the government routinely beat people in her home country. “I didn’t think I’d come here to the United States and the same thing would happen to me.” This morning, I went back to the courthouse with the goal of speaking to the agent who’d tackled Moreta-Galarza. I’d heard the other ICE agents call him Victor, though I can’t be sure that’s his real name. By the time I got there, however, he was gone. ProPublica’s mission is impact. I don’t think any of us expected we’d help bring it about with my video. The question now is what will the government do the next time something like this happens. I asked DHS how many agents have been disciplined this year for misusing force. They did not answer that question.
If you have tips about new ICE enforcement tactics in courts, we want to hear from you. Reach out via Signal (tilleckert.90) or propublica.org/tips. - The ICE List is an open journalistic project, created by the Crustian Daily, aimed at collecting and sharing information that can hold ICE members legally accountable. https://icelist.is/
Sources: Projects Propublica Trump Ice Smashed Windows Deportation Arrests https://projects.propublica.org/trump-ice-smashed-windows-deportation-arrests/ I Filmed the ICE Officer Who Shoved a Woman to the Floor Inside a New York Courthouse https://www.propublica.org/article/ice-officer-shoves-woman-till-eckert A Pattern of Violence Archived Link: https://archive.ph/4KJK1#selection-469.11-469.40 - - Previous Posts: Project 2025 Tracker https://imgur.com/gallery/project-2025-tracker-29SlJ0Q Letter urging residents to report 'brown folks' condemned by Oregon officials. https://imgur.com/gallery/letter-urging-residents-to-report-brown-folks-condemned-by-oregon-officials-HKcaAio The entire archive of all CDC datasets uploaded before January 28th, 2025 has been backed up on Internet Archive. https://imgur.com/gallery/entire-archive-of-all-cdc-datasets-uploaded-before-january-28th-2025-has-been-backed-up-on-internet-archive-https-archive-org-details-20250128-cdc-datasets-E7Ha5pP Elon Deletes Free Tax Program And His Fans Are Baffled. https://imgur.com/gallery/elon-deletes-free-tax-program-his-fans-are-baffled-n97l8Gl Federal health workers terrified after 'DEI' website publishes list of 'targets'. https://imgur.com/gallery/federal-health-workers-terrified-after-dei-website-publishes-list-of-targets-Z5aOyPh Australian Senator Nick McKim Calls Out US's Descent Into Fascism and Trump to create religious office in White House, target 'anti-Christian bias'. https://imgur.com/gallery/australian-senator-nick-mckim-calls-out-uss-descent-into-fascism-trump-to-create-religious-office-white-house-target-anti-christian-bias-gH8hZd1 White House Orders Consumer Protection Agency Shutdown. https://imgur.com/gallery/white-house-orders-consumer-protection-agency-shutdown-JeQGJLY Court Blocks U.S. From Sending 3 Venezuelan Migrants to Guantánamo. https://imgur.com/gallery/court-blocks-u-s-from-sending-3-venezuelan-migrants-to-guant-namo-mng1NDq Vance Says ‘Judges Aren’t Allowed to Control’ Trump’s ‘Legitimate Power’ https://imgur.com/gallery/vance-says-judges-aren-t-allowed-to-control-trump-s-legitimate-power-XuMHTPa ‘Border Czar’ Doubles Down on Asking if DOJ Should Prosecute AOC for Informing Immigrants of Their Rights https://imgur.com/gallery/border-czar-doubles-down-on-asking-if-doj-should-prosecute-aoc-informing-immigrants-of-rights-C58OJsi ICE Prosecutor in Dallas Runs White Supremacist X Account https://imgur.com/gallery/ice-prosecutor-dallas-runs-white-supremacist-x-account-bJHMwgJ Montana Bill Would Charge Women for 'Trafficking' Their Own Fetus https://imgur.com/gallery/montana-bill-would-charge-women-trafficking-own-fetus-FiV1Ybl Andrew Tate Reportedly On Plane To U.S. After Trump Administration Backed MAGA-Loving Influencer https://imgur.com/gallery/andrew-tate-reportedly-on-plane-to-u-s-after-trump-administration-backed-maga-loving-influencer-mv2F7uz RFK Jr. Takes a Sledgehammer to Two Major Vaccine Developments https://imgur.com/gallery/rfk-jr-takes-sledgehammer-to-two-major-vaccine-developments-mR6EOtP NOAA begins firing hundreds of staffers https://imgur.com/gallery/just-time-hurricane-season-naVhzdf "Digital Content Refresh" or what is really is, History Erased. https://imgur.com/gallery/digital-content-refresh-what-is-really-is-history-erased-CcEncKS The Sin of Empathy https://imgur.com/gallery/sin-of-empathy-dmPEf3A Introducing the idea of removing due process. https://imgur.com/gallery/introducing-idea-of-removing-due-process-d0WCJGE There is no Greater Love like Christian Hate. https://imgur.com/gallery/there-is-no-greater-love-like-christian-hate-mHS6HHD DOGE accesses federal payroll system and punishes employees who objected. https://imgur.com/gallery/doge-accesses-federal-payroll-system-punishes-employees-who-objected-OWE7w09 Trump signs sweeping new global tariffs https://imgur.com/gallery/trump-signs-sweeping-new-global-tariffs-04x55ys Justice Dept. Lawyer Who Criticized Administration in Court Is Put on Leave https://imgur.com/gallery/justice-dept-lawyer-who-criticized-administration-court-is-put-on-leave-6iUW4xI Woman's arrest after miscarriage in Georgia draws fear and anger https://imgur.com/gallery/womans-arrest-after-miscarriage-georgia-draws-fear-anger-nxeIeCG Another GOP representative calling for violence. https://imgur.com/gallery/another-gop-representative-calling-violence-L0EKn19 "Fuck You", Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo says to social media critics in leaked audio. https://imgur.com/gallery/you-nevada-gov-joe-lombardo-says-to-social-media-critics-leaked-audio-bcygve4 Attorney representing a student protester detained by federal immigration agents https://imgur.com/gallery/attorney-representing-student-protester-detained-by-federal-immigration-agents-HAUTdIa RFK Jr. Is Using a New Study on Autisms to Push His Anti-Vaccine Agenda https://imgur.com/gallery/rfk-jr-is-using-new-study-on-autisms-to-push-his-anti-vaccine-agenda-rWZEl3T FDA making plans to end its routine food safety inspections, sources say https://imgur.com/gallery/fda-making-plans-to-end-its-routine-food-safety-inspections-sources-say-uzLn6xL Maryland Sen. Van Hollen Meets With Abrego Garcia In El Salvador Amid Court Fight Over U.S. Return https://imgur.com/gallery/maryland-sen-van-hollen-meets-with-abrego-garcia-el-salvador-amid-court-fight-over-u-s-return-PKdC0Z1 American Citizens receive email from the Department of Homeland Security telling them to leave the U.S. “immediately” because their “parole” was terminated. https://imgur.com/gallery/american-citizens-receive-email-from-department-of-homeland-security-telling-them-to-leave-u-s-immediately-because-parole-was-terminated-GLF7oWW COVID Government website (covid.gov) now redirects to https://www.whitehouse.gov/lab-leak-true-origins-of-covid-19/ https://imgur.com/gallery/covid-government-website-covid-gov-now-redirects-to-https-www-whitehouse-gov-lab-leak-true-origins-of-covid-19-3Lbt3p4 United pilot attacked passenger for taking too long in the bathroom, lawsuit alleges. https://imgur.com/gallery/united-pilot-attacked-passenger-taking-too-long-bathroom-lawsuit-alleges-cv2Srwa Judge Hannah Dugan arrested by FBI for allegedly helping undocumented immigrant 'evade arrest' https://imgur.com/gallery/judge-hannah-dugan-arrested-by-fbi-allegedly-helping-undocumented-immigrant-evade-arrest-lPRMaLY SOS: Migrants held in Texas fear notorious El Salvador prison https://imgur.com/gallery/sos-migrants-held-texas-fear-notorious-el-salvador-prison-i2taqop The Justice Department ended a decades-old school desegregation order. Others are expected to fall. https://imgur.com/gallery/justice-department-ended-decades-old-school-desegregation-order-others-are-expected-to-fall-5cfiaX3 Brain-dead woman must carry fetus to birth because of Georgia’s abortion ban, hospital tells family. https://imgur.com/gallery/brain-dead-woman-must-carry-fetus-to-birth-because-of-georgia-s-abortion-ban-hospital-tells-family-KfoGGea RFK Jr. Says He's Exploring A Crackdown On This Perfectly Safe Medication https://imgur.com/gallery/rfk-jr-says-hes-exploring-crackdown-on-this-perfectly-safe-medication-h7rS1I4 RFK Jr. says he may bar scientists from publishing in top medical journals https://imgur.com/gallery/rfk-jr-says-he-may-bar-scientists-from-publishing-top-medical-journals-LtDIG4O FEMA staff confused after head said he was unaware of US hurricane season, sources say. https://imgur.com/gallery/fema-staff-confused-after-head-said-he-was-unaware-of-us-hurricane-season-sources-say-7qRcGEa South Florida meteorologist warns viewers NWS staff shortages will impact his hurricane forecasts https://imgur.com/gallery/south-florida-meteorologist-warns-viewers-nws-staff-shortages-will-impact-his-hurricane-forecasts-7ixXB3R Anti-vaccine advocate RFK Jr. fires entire CDC panel of vaccine advisors https://imgur.com/gallery/anti-vaccine-advocate-rfk-jr-fires-entire-cdc-panel-of-vaccine-advisors-CGrFtFV Scientific American is republishing an article on How Not To Be Killed By The Police from 2020. https://imgur.com/gallery/scientific-american-is-republishing-article-on-how-not-to-be-killed-by-police-from-2020-jiA3jRC The Onion doing the work of “the media”. https://imgur.com/gallery/onion-doing-work-of-media-RDqr2n5 Grok praises Hitler, gives credit to Musk for removing “woke filters” https://imgur.com/gallery/grok-praises-hitler-gives-credit-to-musk-removing-woke-filters-tZ1pWBl DHS is urging law enforcement to treat even skateboarding and livestreaming as signs of violent intent during a protest, turning everyday behavior into a pretext for police action. https://imgur.com/gallery/dhs-is-urging-law-enforcement-to-treat-even-skateboarding-livestreaming-as-signs-of-violent-intent-during-protest-turning-everyday-behavior-into-pretext-police-action-6w5VmBG Pennsylvania man gets life in prison after murdering his federal government employee father, decapitating him and brandishing the severed head in an online video that called for the execution of other civil servants. https://imgur.com/gallery/pennsylvania-man-gets-life-prison-after-murdering-his-federal-government-employee-father-decapitating-him-brandishing-severed-head-online-video-that-called-execution-of-other-civil-servants-XnA7UGZ Senate approves cuts to NPR, PBS and foreign aid programs https://imgur.com/gallery/senate-approves-cuts-to-npr-pbs-foreign-aid-programs-78KJL7o Pregnant Woman in Tennessee Denied Care for Being Unmarried https://imgur.com/gallery/pregnant-woman-tennessee-denied-care-being-unmarried-yWVoz6j IRS says churches can endorse political candidates to congregations https://imgur.com/gallery/irs-says-churches-can-endorse-political-candidates-to-congregations-JXCF7x9 Executive Order for sending homeless people & people with mental illness to concentration camps https://imgur.com/gallery/president-signs-executive-order-that-lays-groundwork-sending-homeless-people-people-with-mental-illness-to-concentration-camps-to-be-civilly-committed-was-never-going-to-stop-with-immigrants-4L8TsYM Once again, All Cops Are Bastards and All Cops Are Cowards. https://imgur.com/gallery/once-again-all-cops-are-bastards-all-cops-are-cowards-rLvK9Ym You Went to a Drag Show—Now the State of Florida Wants Your Name https://imgur.com/gallery/you-went-to-drag-show-now-state-of-florida-wants-name-ZoSugkJ Bigots Honoring Bigots (NSFW Audio) https://imgur.com/gallery/bigots-honoring-bigots-nsfw-audio-fktkx6N Guess Who’s Eligible for Student Loan Forgiveness:New ICE Agents https://imgur.com/gallery/guess-who-s-eligible-student-loan-forgiveness-new-ice-agents-fUT3CEM South Park and ICE https://imgur.com/gallery/south-park-ice-blRfZ1I The Intercept confirmed that a federal agent caught on camera wearing a hard hat and safety vest works for ICE. https://imgur.com/gallery/intercept-confirmed-that-federal-agent-caught-on-camera-wearing-hard-hat-safety-vest-works-ice-QFHZVQ8 From Book Bans to Internet Bans:Wyoming Lets Parents Control the Whole State’s Access to The Internet https://imgur.com/gallery/from-book-bans-to-internet-bans-wyoming-lets-parents-control-whole-state-s-access-to-internet-4AD89F1 Coming soon to all 50 States and if you think the 1st Amendment will stop them, you haven't been paying attention. https://imgur.com/gallery/coming-soon-to-all-50-states-if-you-think-1st-amendment-will-stop-them-you-havent-been-paying-attention-they-are-targeting-trans-people-vpns-to-limit-information-fA364yx

item.title: Something I love about Japan…
item.description: If you have ever been to Japan, you will notice it is very clean despite not finding many public trash cans…. This is one of the reasons why…. I quite often see families and individuals taking walk to pick up trash around their neighborhoods…. I love how this family is making sooo fun and teaching kids early! Wanted to share! Have a great day on Imgur & Love from Japan!
item.dc:creator: Come2Japan

item.title: GovBrief Today #239
item.description: ? They dropped 28 major stories tonight betting you'd already checked out for the weekend, but the purge is impossible to miss. More Trump enemies are being investigated and FBI agents who kneeled at a protest five years ago were fired today. But the systems are holding against some abuses. Giuliani and Lindell are paying for their 2020 election lies while a judge reinstated some Defense Dept. union protections. Whether you're thrown to the ground or get fast-tracked funds depends entirely on which list you're on. Don't get distracted. Get the news and share it widely. We can't just normalize this behavior. Don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/memphis-more-federal-agents [2] https://go.govbrief.today/noem-fema-donor-expedite [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ca-med-abortion-privacy [4] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-halts-deportation-order [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-officer-relieved-duties [6] https://go.govbrief.today/states-sue-sex-ed [7] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-birthright-citizenship-challenge [8] https://go.govbrief.today/national-parks-leaders-shutdown [9] https://go.govbrief.today/atlanta-airport-dei-grants [10] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-fires-agents-kneeling [11] https://go.govbrief.today/giuliani-dominion-settle [12] https://go.govbrief.today/generals-meeting-themes [13] https://go.govbrief.today/willis-doj-travel-probe [14] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-oks-freeze-4b [15] https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-ice-baton-rounds [16] https://go.govbrief.today/florida-6k-immigration-arrests [17] https://go.govbrief.today/des-moines-supe-detained [18] https://go.govbrief.today/ca-us-attorney-fired [19] https://go.govbrief.today/dems-new-epstein-records [20] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-trail-bike-grants [21] https://go.govbrief.today/immigrant-truck-driver-ban [22] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-earhart-files [23] https://go.govbrief.today/lindell-loses-smartmatic-defamation [24] https://go.govbrief.today/kimmel-returns-all-stations [25] https://go.govbrief.today/uae-takes-15percent-tiktok [26] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-microsoft-fire-monaco [27] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-lithium-us-stake [28] https://go.govbrief.today/dod-union-rights-restored Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
MrPuckett here super excited to be back for TheFreePizzaDude today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
This has been a big help for us to feed more people and we love you so much https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
The Pucketts are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
15,919 meals since we started 1,157 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1245 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 140 5th, 6th, 7th and 8th by @OP 210 9th, 10th and 11th by Pizza Angel @arandomNUN 300 12th, 13th and 14th by Pizza Angel @pirokiko 350 15th, 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 425 18th, 19th, 20th, 21st, 22nd and Michael Jordan by Pizza Angel @WafflesOfMassDeliciousness 435 Kobe Bryant and 25th by Pizza Angel @ARandomNuN 442 26th, 27th, 28th, 29th and 30th by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 500 31st by Pizza Angel @sesamesnapsinhalf 540 32nd, 33rd and 34th by Pizza Angel @ARandomNuN ... Today's Grocery Tally 500 1st by Grocery Angel @ezcik 510 2nd by Grocery Angel @MurphyPandorasLawBox ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 34 meals Filled 2 huge grocery orders That's 15,954 meals since we started 1,159 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: ICE agents point guns at bystanders during violent arrest in Maryland | “What’re you gonna do? Shoot me?” one witness yelled. “Go ahead. Shoot me.”
item.description: https://www.thehandbasket.co/p/ice-agents-guns-arrest-hyattsville-witnesses
